author: claude-bugfix
content: Decision: For bug #1, chose module-level functions over Object.defineProperty with enumerable:false — module-level is cleaner and has zero prototype chain footprint. For bug #2, used computed property setter (set [property]) which correctly creates a named setter descriptor. For bug #3, WeakSet for wrappedObjects (presence-only check) and WeakMap for proxies (key-value with object keys) — both allow GC of unreferenced objects. For bug #6, replaced mutating string.replace loop with filter-based approach — simpler, handles all occurrences, avoids the trim mismatch.
